title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine as it enters its next growth phase. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience with globally distributed teams collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ is required.
score_reason: Exceptional match on all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS expertise aligns perfectly, deep Salesforce/RevOps background directly addresses core needs, and experience scaling high-growth companies maps to $30M+ ARR requirement. Tel Aviv location is ideal fit.
ai_opener: Omri—I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and thought of you immediately. You've spent 15 years building revenue engines for high-growth B2B SaaS companies, and Finout is at exactly the inflection point where that operational expertise becomes the difference between chaotic scaling and predictable growth. The chance to report to a CRO and architect the GTM backbone for a fintech innovator entering its next phase seems like it was written for your background.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager to partner with Sales and RevOps, providing dashboards, reporting tools, and regional insights to optimize territory performance. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance on territory composition, and maintaining accurate territory mapping in CRM systems like Fullcast and Salesforce. Requires a deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy and dashboarding are core RevOps competencies, though the role is slightly narrower (territory focus) than his typical Head of RevOps scope.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I've been following Gong's trajectory in conversation intelligence—your territory optimization work directly impacts sales velocity and predictability. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM operations and deep Salesforce expertise, I've redesigned territory models for hypergrowth stages similar to Gong's expansion needs. I'd welcome a conversation about how advanced territory analytics can compound your land-and-expand motion.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Platomics, a healthcare tech company, is hiring a RevOps Manager (20h/week, with potential to move full-time in 2027) to administer its CRM (HubSpot) and RevOps tools, ensuring integrations and data hygiene. The role partners with sales, marketing, and finance to align goals and revenue strategies, supports forecasting, territory planning, and quota setting, and trains teams on processes. Requires 3+ years in revenue operations, sales operations, or business analytics, preferably in tech, plus knowledge of forecasting and pipeline management. Remote anywhere in Europe.
score_reason: Strong technical RevOps fit (HubSpot, forecasting, pipeline management align perfectly), but the 20h/week part-time structure and healthcare focus (outside core B2B SaaS/Fintech expertise) create moderate misalignment for a senior executive with 15+ years expecting full-time strategic impact.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Platomics' RevOps Manager opening and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years scaling revenue operations in B2B SaaS, combined with deep HubSpot and forecasting expertise, maps directly to their CRM administration and data hygiene challenges. The team-enablement and cross-functional alignment aspects (sales, marketing, finance) play to your strengths, though I wanted to surface that this starts at 20h/week before potentially moving full-time in 2027—curious if that cadence works for your current situation?

title: Revenue Operations (RevOps) Manager
description: Passage Health is hiring its first dedicated RevOps leader to serve as a core member of GTM leadership and the architect of data, insights, and operational excellence across Sales and Marketing. Working hand-in-hand with the CEO and GTM leadership, you will define key metrics, uncover opportunities, and ensure revenue teams run with precision and scale. Passage's mandate to build RevOps from scratch as a GTM leadership lever resonates deeply; I've built exactly these systems at scale and would relish defining the operational backbone for health tech's next growth phase.

title: RevOps Manager

I'd love to explore how I can own Instrumentl's technical revenue infrastructure.
